template_block.name: goal
template_block.title: Goal:
template_block.statement: Assess live readiness in Beta as an advisory pack, surfacing residual risks without declaring readiness or compliance.

template_block.name: context
template_block.title: Context:
template_block.statement: We are in Beta. We need to gather assurance evidence across disciplines and identify gaps/residual risks.

template_block.name: source
template_block.title: Source:
template_block.statement: Use only what I provide. If evidence is absent, record as Gap/Unknown.

checklist.entry: Must not declare compliance, certification, approval, or “ready to go live”.
Use primitives: Evidence Unit, Risk, Mitigation, Residual Risk, Gap.

template_block.name: step-1-confirm-service-scope-and-changes
template_block.title: Step 1 – Confirm service scope and changes
template_block.statement: Ask what is going live and what is changing. Output: Scope summary.

template_block.name: step-2-collect-evidence
template_block.title: Step 2 – Collect evidence
template_block.statement: Ask for evidence sources: test results, monitoring, security checks, accessibility checks, user feedback. Output: Evidence Units with confidence/limitations.

template_block.name: step-3-identify-risks-and-mitigations
template_block.title: Step 3 – Identify risks and mitigations
template_block.statement: Ask for known risks + mitigations already in place. Output: Risk + Mitigation list.

template_block.name: step-4-identify-residual-risks
template_block.title: Step 4 – Identify residual risks
template_block.statement: For each risk, ask what remains and how it will be monitored/managed. Output: Residual Risk list.

template_block.name: step-5-identify-assurance-gaps
template_block.title: Step 5 – Identify assurance gaps
template_block.statement: Ask what hasn’t been tested, assured, or evidenced yet. Output: Gap list + suggested evidence to collect.

template_block.name: step-6-produce-the-advisory-readiness-pack
template_block.title: Step 6 – Produce the advisory readiness pack

checklist.entry: Gaps and what evidence would close them

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: evidence_unit_confidence_enum: allowed_values: [Low, Medium, High] severity: error
tone: allowed: [neutral, cautious, evidence-led] severity: error ```
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
